acceptance_schema.canonical_higgs_operator: explicit same-surface operator O_H or H_radial on Cl(3)/Z3 fields
forbidden_substitutes: EW gauge-mass algebra after canonical H is assumed
D17 carrier support without source overlap
acceptance_schema.normalization: canonical kinetic/LSZ normalization certificate for H
acceptance_schema.purity_gate: Res(C_sH)^2 = Res(C_ss) Res(C_HH) at isolated pole

actual_current_surface_status: open / canonical-Higgs operator realization gate not passed
exact_next_action: Construct a same-surface canonical-Higgs operator with C_HH and C_sH residues, derive rank-one purity, implement W/Z response with identity certificates, or continue seed-controlled FH/LSZ production.
proposal_allowed_reason: No same-surface canonical-Higgs operator or C_sH/C_HH residue certificate exists.
strict_non_claims: does not claim retained or proposed_retained y_t closure
does not treat EW gauge-mass algebra as source-Higgs operator realization
does not use observed W/Z masses, static v, H_unit, or yt_ward_identity
does not set kappa_s = 1 or cos(theta)=1
verdict: The C_sH / Gram-purity route needs a concrete same-surface canonical-Higgs operator.  Current EW Higgs gauge-mass artifacts assume canonical H and derive object-level mass algebra after that assumption; they do not realize O_H on the PR #230 Cl(3)/Z3 source surface.  The production harness has scalar-source response and C_ss support, but no C_sH or C_HH operator path.
